appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Code Review (Pointer)' section with QEMU limitation documentation, key source files list, and isolation rules for pointer assertions. Added 'Validation Concurrency' section with surface-specific max concurrency limits.

codeReview.reason: QEMU does not route HMP/QMP/VNC mouse events to virtio-tablet devices in headless mode. Validated via code review of compositor, input driver, drawing library, and text editor source + 22 pointer-specific unit tests.

qemuScreenshots.reason: Full demo flow requires interactive keyboard input and visual verification via QEMU screenshots.

unitTests.reason: Regression check — ran full 921 test suite (900 system + 21 prototype), 0 failures.
